calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Olie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Atty. Nancy Brown, Esq. for Plaintiff: TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY

After hearing the testimony from Atty. Brown considering of the Exhibits and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY and against the Defaulted Defendant: TIRRELL MUHAMMAD as follows:

Costs $ 1,169.50, for a total of $1,169.50 AND A DECLARATION THAT TOPA INSURANCE POLICY DOES NOT PROVIDE COVERAGE TO TIRRELL MUHAMMAD FOR DEFENSE OR INDEMNITY OF THE ACTION ENTITLED GREENWOOD VS. MUHAMMAD, CASE NO, 448714.

Judgment signed in Open Court.
